files.nameExists: A document with that name already exists.
files.decryptCorrupt: Cannot decrypt: wrong vault key or corrupted file
files.downloadNeedPhone: Open the phone page, then try Download again.
home.tagline:
A text editor for use with a physical keyboard.
With Markdown support.
home.tip:
Open the Files tab.
Use Tab or Left / Right to switch pages.
home.sleeping:
Writerdeck is sleeping.
Wi-Fi is off. Press power to wake.
keyboard.btBody: Pair the keyboard to your phone, then open the address below (or scan the code). Typing is forwarded over Wi-Fi.
keyboard.usbBody:
Connect with a USB OTG cable.
Changing layout restarts Writerdeck.
sync.title: GitHub sync
sync.lastSync:
Last sync was %1.
Documents sync to github.com/%2
sync.notConfigured:
Sync not configured.
Set up in phone Sync setup:
http://%1:%2
sync.tokenBody:
GitHub token is not on the tablet.
Open phone Sync setup and tap Save:
http://%1:%2
Repo: github.com/%3
sync.footnote: Sync also runs automatically on save, Home, and every few minutes.
settings.title: Settings
settings.privateOn: On - encrypted documents require PIN to open, read, or edit
settings.privateOff: Off - optional encryption with a separate 6-digit PIN. Recovery via GitHub secret/pin when sync is on.
settings.pinHelp: Ctrl-M - cycle PIN length. Adding a PIN ensures that only intended devices can access your documents.
settings.pinNoneWarn: Anyone on Wi-Fi can read and edit documents
settings.serviceHelp: Stop Writerdeck and return the tablet to the stock reMarkable UI. Reconnect later via SSH or reboot.
dialog.noKeyboardBody:
USB: plug in with an OTG cable.

Bluetooth: pair to your phone, then open the address below (or scan the code).
vault.open: Enter PIN to open this document
vault.edit: Enter PIN to edit encrypted document
vault.read: Enter PIN to read encrypted document
vault.create: Enter PIN to create encrypted document
vault.download: Enter PIN on tablet to allow phone download
shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.body:
Pages
Tab or Left / Right - next or previous page
Optional Ctrl-letter jumps live in lobby-ui.json (tabs.*); none ship by default

Files
Up / Down - move the selection (turns the page at the edge)
Page Up / Page Down - previous or next page of documents
↵ - edit the selected document
Ctrl-V - read · Ctrl-M - new · Ctrl-I - rename · Ctrl-B - delete
Ctrl-G - download to phone
With private documents on: Ctrl-E - new encrypted · Ctrl-X - encrypt · Ctrl-Y - decrypt

Keyboard
Ctrl-U - US layout · Ctrl-O - Norwegian

Sync
↵ - sync now

Settings
Ctrl-A - cycle reading font · Ctrl-M - cycle phone PIN length
Ctrl-O - cycle rotation · Ctrl-E - enable private documents · Ctrl-C - change private PIN
Ctrl-X - exit Writerdeck (then Enter to confirm)

Anywhere
Ctrl-C / Ctrl-X / Ctrl-V - copy, cut, paste (while editing a document)
Physical Home - from a document, back to Files; from Lobby, quit to the stock UI
(Keyboard Home is caret motion only -- not that button.)

Private PIN
Type the six digits on a USB keyboard, or on the phone while it shows the PIN banner.

Open Lobby from the stock UI
Esc on a USB keyboard, or both page buttons together.
